data.content: Implementation: replaced immediate-fire bulk edit dropdowns with a pending-state + Apply button pattern. Dropdowns now accumulate changes locally in useState; clicking Apply sends all pending fields in one onBulkUpdate call, then resets all dropdowns via key-based remount (resetKey). This fixes the repeated-same-value bug and enables multi-attribute changes in one shot. All quality gates pass: 2060 tests, tsc clean, lint 0 errors, build clean. Feature branch: worktree-62fa-apply-button, commit e45ebf2b.
